metadata.title: Loneliness Will Sit Over Our Roofs With Brooding Wings
tracklist: 01 To Be Gentle - Your Passion Sinks Its Teeth Into My Weary Spirit
03 To Be Gentle - All of My Friends Live Inside My Head
05 To Be Gentle - Your Guts Are Like Mine
06 To Be Gentle - Kiss Me, You're Beautiful, These Are Truly the Last Days
08 To Be Gentle - I Wasn't Ready and I Never Will Be
09 To Be Gentle - Endless Circles / Pathways to Emotional Arrest (Bonus Track)
